strengths: 15+ years of broad full-stack engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and distributed systems
Hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Distributed-systems background including high-throughput, low-latency microservices at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
concerns: No demonstrated executive leadership or experience scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+
No production multi-agent AI systems track record in regulated, high-stakes environments
Limited fintech-infrastructure depth (credit systems, real-time risk, liquidity/margin) relative to CTO scope

key_factors.factor: Executive leadership & team scaling track record

response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned individual-contributor software craftsman with strong distributed-systems and full-stack breadth, plus emerging exposure to agentic AI tooling through MCP work at re:cinq. However, the resume shows no executive leadership history, no track record scaling 10→30+ engineering organizations, and no production multi-agent AI systems in regulated fintech contexts — all hard requirements for this CTO role. Fit for the role as specified appears limited without substantial additional leadership and domain evidence.
